params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: owner
params.description: Filter test plans by owner (user display name or email)

params.name: includePlanDetails
params.description: Whether to return full plan details or just IDs and names

params.name: filterActivePlans
params.description: Return only active (non-completed) test plans

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: isLastUpdatedSet
params.description: Whether to return plans sorted by last update

items.docs: Returns a list of test plans in the project. Test plans are the top-level containers for organizing test suites and test cases. They are typically associated with a release milestone or sprint.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a test plan

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new test plan in the project. A test plan defines the scope of testing for a release, milestone, or sprint. It can be associated with an area path and iteration path to align with the project structure.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a test plan

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific test plan, including its area path, iteration, owner, and date range. Use the plan ID to retrieve test suites associated with this plan.

info.name: Azure DevOps Update a test plan

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

items.docs: Updates properties of an existing test plan such as its name, description, area path, iteration, start date, and end date.

info.name: Azure DevOps Delete a test plan

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

items.docs: Permanently deletes a test plan and all its suites and configurations. This operation cannot be undone. All associated test results and run data will also be deleted.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional suite details

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: asTreeView
params.description: Return suites in a tree structure

items.docs: Returns a list of test suites within a test plan. Test suites organize test cases into logical groups. A plan always has a root suite, and suites can be nested for hierarchical organization.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a test suite

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

items.docs: Creates a new test suite within a test plan. Suites can be static (manually added test cases), requirement-based (linked to work item queries), or query-based (dynamic results from a work item query).

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a test suite

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

params.name: suiteId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test suite

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional suite details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific test suite, including its type, parent suite, and associated test cases.

info.name: Azure DevOps List test cases in a suite

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

params.name: suiteId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test suite

params.name: testIds
params.description: Comma-separated list of test case IDs to filter

params.name: configurationIds
params.description: Comma-separated list of configuration IDs to filter

params.name: witFields
params.description: Comma-separated work item field reference names to include

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional test case details

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: returnIdentityRef
params.description: Whether to return identity fields as full IdentityRef objects

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of test cases to return

params.name: isRecursive
params.description: Whether to include test cases from child suites

items.docs: Returns a list of test cases within a specific test suite. Test cases are work items of type Test Case that contain the test steps and expected results for manual or automated tests.

info.name: Azure DevOps Add test cases to a suite

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: planId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test plan

params.name: suiteId
params.description: Numeric ID of the test suite to add test cases to

items.docs: Adds existing test case work items to a test suite. Test cases must be existing work items of type Test Case. Provide a list of work item IDs to add to the suite.
